content.intro: Sending an offer via Offers V2 takes under two minutes. The process captures the property, advertised rent, and tenant email, then delivers a secure offer form link directly to the applicant.

steps.title: Open Offers V2
steps.content: Click Offers in the sidebar. This opens the V2 offers platform. Do not use Legacy References for new offers.

steps.title: Click Send Offer
steps.content: Click the 'Send Offer' button in the top right corner of the Offers V2 screen.

steps.title: Select the Property
steps.content: Choose the property from the dropdown or start typing an address to search. The property must already exist in the Properties tab.

steps.title: Enter the Advertised Rent
steps.content: Enter the advertised monthly rent for the property. This is the maximum amount a tenant can offer — they may offer less but cannot exceed this figure.

steps.title: Enter the Tenant's Email Address
steps.content: Type the applicant's email address. They will receive a secure link to complete the offer form online.

steps.title: Optionally Add Reposit / Unithomes
steps.content: Tick the Reposit and/or Unithomes checkboxes if you want to include deposit replacement options in the tenant's offer form. This is optional.

steps.title: Click Send
steps.content: Click Send to dispatch the offer. The tenant receives an email with a link to complete and submit their offer.

sections.title: Advertised Rent is Locked
sections.content: The advertised rent you enter acts as a ceiling. Tenants can submit an offer at or below this amount but the form will not allow them to enter a higher figure. This is a deliberate RRA compliance feature.

sections.title: No Discriminatory Language
sections.content: Do not include discriminatory language (such as 'No DSS', 'No pets', or 'No children') in any property notes or offer communications. This is prohibited under the Renters Rights Act 2025.
